title: Exoper Broker Catalog — Brand Record
description: Authoritative contract for a single broker brand file under infrastructure/broker-catalog/<brand_id>.json. One file per brand. Validated fail-closed by src/engine/ta/broker/registry.py at engine boot. See MT5_Multi_Broker_Provisioning_Architecture.md §5.2.

brand_id.description: Lowercase, underscore-separated brand identifier. Must match the filename stem.

display_name.description: Brand name exactly as the broker presents it.

mt5_supported.description: Whether this broker offers an MT5 terminal at all. When false, entities MUST be empty.

installer_packaging.description: How the broker packages its MT5 installer. 'none' for brands that do not offer MT5.

status.description: Lifecycle state. 'active' is only permitted after the verification gate passes and the bundle + sha are published to R2 (see conditional rules below).

notes.description: Free-text operator context (packaging observations, regional restrictions, why a brand is unsupported, etc.).

entities.description: Legal entities under this brand that offer MT5. Empty iff mt5_supported is false.

allOf.description: A brand that does not support MT5 must carry no entities.
A brand that supports MT5 must carry at least one entity.
An active brand must have every entity fully provisioned (R2 bundle + sha + non-empty live servers). Enforced per-entity in the loader; expressed here for documentation.

entity_id.description: Brand-prefixed, lowercase, underscore-separated entity identifier (e.g. exness_technologies_ltd).

display_name.description: Entity's full legal name exactly as the broker publishes it.

regulator.description: Short-form regulator name for display (e.g. 'FSA Seychelles', 'CySEC'). Advisory only.

acquisition_url.description: ACQUISITION ONLY — the broker's own official installer URL used ONCE BY A HUMAN on the bake workstation. This is NEVER a runtime/pipeline fetch path; the CI build guard blocks download.mql5.com as a build arg. The system fetch path is bundle_r2_path.

bundle_r2_path.description: SYSTEM FETCH PATH — the only path the provisioner/initContainer pulls from. The baked, sha-pinned per-broker portable zip in R2.

bundle_sha256.description: SHA256 of the baked portable zip referenced by bundle_r2_path. 64 lowercase hex chars.

verified_on.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the verification gate passed for this entity's bundle.

servers.description: Exact server strings extracted from the baked servers.dat (verbatim, every numbered variant). NEVER researched as free text.
